text: HyperionDeFi (HYPD) has shifted from passive treasury holdings to an active deployment strategy, generating new revenue streams from DeFi monetization and ecosystem rewards. Despite a GAAP net loss due to accounting for token impairments, the operating business grew with increased revenue and gross profit. The active strategy includes multiple agreements and airdrops, expanding HYPD's HYPE holdings organically and positioning it for significant growth in 2026.
author: elfa_2037474625312174104

text: The Hyperliquid ecosystem is innovating with AI-powered autonomous trading agents, enabling users to deploy AI agents that auto-trade on Hyperliquid without coding. Competitions with significant rewards incentivize development and usage of these AI agents, showcasing the platform's commitment to integrating AI and DeFi trading.
author: elfa_2037568378546606354

text: Hyperliquid is gaining recognition beyond crypto-native circles, with academic interest exemplified by a Harvard professor delivering lectures on Hyperliquid's origin and success. This indicates growing institutional and educational engagement with the platform and its ecosystem.
author: elfa_2037508750144065723

text: MetaMask now fully supports HyperEVM, the Ethereum Virtual Machine compatible layer of HyperliquidX, improving user accessibility and integration with the Hyperliquid ecosystem. This partnership enhances the user experience for trading and interacting with Hyperliquid's decentralized finance products.
author: elfa_2037540942278750298

text: Hyperliquid has introduced the first Malaysian Ringgit ($MYR) offramp, enabling users to send $MYR to any Malaysian bank account. This liquid banking feature enhances fiat on/off ramp capabilities for the Hyperliquid ecosystem, facilitating broader adoption and usability in Southeast Asia.
author: elfa_2037539966281298122

text: Kinetiq, a major protocol on Hyperliquid, is expanding its ecosystem with liquid staking tokens (LST) like $kHYPE, HIP-3 perpetuals, a launch platform, and a mobile app. It dominates 75% of LST market share on Hyperliquid and has processed $2.3 billion in HIP-3 volume. Kinetiq focuses on active deployment strategies, yield optimization, and institutional products, rejecting large VC funding to maintain organic growth. The protocol is a key driver of Hyperliquid's active revenue streams and ecosystem expansion.
author: elfa_2037570921515364850

text: HIP-3 market on Hyperliquid has become a major DeFi event in 2026, with daily trading volumes reaching $5.4 billion and open interest surging over 100x in six months. The market includes commodities like silver, WTI and Brent crude oil, and gold, accounting for 30%-50% of total platform volume. This growth is driven by regulatory support in the US and the platform's 24/7 operation, which attracts traditional traders seeking liquidity during weekends and off-hours. The platform is evolving into a chain-native broker, bridging traditional finance and DeFi with real-world asset tokenization and continuous trading.
author: elfa_2037344297922818194

text: Hyperliquid and its ecosystem are experiencing significant growth and adoption, with daily new users hitting new highs and total liquidations exceeding $1.5 billion. The platform is gaining traction among traditional finance traders, especially for 24/7 trading of commodities and tokenized stocks, filling liquidity gaps during traditional market off-hours. Hyperliquid's HIP-3 market has seen record trading volumes, attracting nearly 50,000 new users who are non-crypto-first traders. The platform supports a wide range of assets including commodities, US stocks, ETFs, pre-IPO companies, and forex, positioning itself as a chain-native broker-like venue for real-world assets (RWA). Integration with MetaMask and support for HyperEVM further enhance accessibility. Additionally, Hyperliquid is fostering an AI-driven autonomous trading ecosystem with competitions and agent deployments, indicating innovation in trading infrastructure.

text: Tether has selected KPMG to conduct a full audit of its approximately $185 billion USDT reserves and hired PwC to prepare its internal systems. The move comes as Tether plans a U.S. expansion and seeks to raise $15–20 billion amid investor concerns over pricing and regulatory risk. The audit will go beyond BDO Italia's monthly attestations, covering assets, liabilities, internal controls, and reporting systems. — link

text: Brazil has passed a new law targeting organized crime, which was signed into effect by President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva this Tuesday. The law allows law enforcement authorities to seize, confiscate, or freeze digital or virtual assets, including Bitcoin, when there is strong evidence of serious crimes, and permits court-authorized early liquidation under certain circumstances, with proceeds allocated to public security. — link

text: According to Bloomberg, White House tech advisor David Sacks said he has ended his tenure as the "AI and crypto czar" due to the time limit of his role as a special government employee; he will transition to co-chair of the President's Council of Advisors on Science and Technology, continuing to work on AI and broader tech policy matters. — link
